flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Sussex County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Sussex County Community College rose 31% between 2006 and 2009 (20.6% → 27.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Sussex County Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 2.1k).
